message:
fix(service): add RefreshPendingGuard for RAII reconnect triggering

Replace manual refresh_pending flag manipulation in the reconnect
service future with a RefreshPendingGuard that arms on construction and
triggers reconnect when dropped while still armed. The guard is defused
on success and pending — only error drops leave it armed, which
atomically sets refresh_pending when the epoch still matches.

This fixes a subtle race where a panicking inner future could skip the
refresh_pending write, causing the reconnect service to believe the
connection was still healthy and never attempt recovery.

Also updates tests to use boxed futures instead of Ready to better
exercise the poll lifecycle and guard semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
